prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. A white ensō (zen circle) — an incomplete circle drawn as a single organic brushstroke. The gap is subtle, not screaming 'C shape', just a natural opening in the circle where the brush lifted. Near the gap or at the start of the brushstroke, a small solid red dot — like a recording indicator light. The dot is tiny relative to the ensō, like a quiet signal that something is being captured. White brushstroke, small red dot, black background. Nothing else. No text. Organic, hand-painted calligraphy feeling. The stroke varies in thickness naturally.
